name: trust_swap
description: Trust-gated token swap: bundles token_check + Uniswap quote in one call. Before returning calldata, verifies the output token for honeypot risk, tax, and contract safety. Returns: trustScore, verdict, riskFlags, riskSummary, Uniswap quote (amountOut, priceImpact, route), unsigned calldata. You sign and submit — Maiat never holds funds. Use when: you want to swap but need safety verification first. If verdict is 'avoid', calldata is withheld. For check-only without swapping, use token_check.

amountIn.description: Amount of tokenIn to swap. Accepts ETH decimal ("0.01") or wei ("10000000000000000"). Also accepts field name "amount".

swapper.description: Your wallet address (optional — defaults to zero address for quote-only)

slippage.description: Slippage tolerance as percentage (default: 0.5 = 0.5%) or factor (0.005)

calldata.description: Unsigned Uniswap tx calldata — you sign and submit

to.description: Universal Router address to send tx to

value.description: ETH value to include (0 for ERC20 swaps)

warning.description: Present if verdict is caution or risky
